# networking corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Cisco IOS ===
# expect: Cisco Type 0 Cleartext Password
enable password 0 mySecret123

# expect: Cisco Type 7 Password
password 7 070C285F4D06

# expect: Cisco Type 5 Secret
enable secret 5 $1$gBk3$sBeTOYNqovqiccFjqQoV01

# expect: Cisco Type 8 Secret
enable secret 8 $8$dsYGNam3K1SIJO$7nv35Mqr6tdzOUUgwjPlCBNuJOWrhC8Cq8oRT9Zabcd

# expect: Cisco Type 9 Secret
enable secret 9 $9$nhEmQVczB7dqsO$XHsgL6x1il0RxkOSSvyQYwucySCt7qFm4v7pqCxkKMx

# expect: Cisco ASA Encrypted Password
passwd 2KFQnbNIdI.2KYOU encrypted

# === Juniper ===
# expect: Juniper Junos $9$ Secret
set system root-authentication encrypted-password $9$01X1EyM87s2alK2aZUmO1R

# expect: Juniper Junos $8$ Secret
$8$aes256-gcm$hmac-sha2-256$100$AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUv

# === Fortinet ===
# expect: FortiGate Encrypted Password
set passwd ENC uCn8uiVJqzzEm8iba4onCc98AJDiYggVSDlYIphgjN3abcdEFGH1234

# expect: FortiManager Access Token
access_token=97f3cnrxht4nrkf1mnutb320000000

# === Palo Alto ===
# expect: Palo Alto PAN-OS API Key
LUFRPT1ZQXFhM2tabUljdjBucXpoeWZJUUZ5T0E9MDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMDA=

# === AAA / SNMP ===
# expect: Cisco RADIUS/TACACS Key Type 7
radius-server key 7 19283103834782

# expect: Cisco RADIUS/TACACS Key Cleartext
tacacs-server key 0 supersecret

# expect: SNMP Community String
snmp-server community s3cretc0mm RO

# expect: SNMPv3 USM Credentials
snmp-server user u1 g1 v3 auth sha P@ssw0rd priv aes 128 P@ssw0rd2

# expect: FreeRADIUS Shared Secret
secret = "4AwR0c1lrh5jMQTl"

# expect: BIND rndc.key HMAC Secret
secret "c3RyaW5nLXNlY3JldGtleWFiY2Q=";

# === DNS / Cloudflare ===
# expect: NS1 API Key
X-NSONE-Key: qACMD09OJXBxT7XOuRs8

# expect: Cloudflare User API Token
cfut_abcdefghij1234567890klmnopqrstuvwx9876543210ABcd

# expect: Cloudflare Account API Token
cfat_abcdefghij1234567890klmnopqrstuvwx9876543210ABcd

# === Proxies ===
# expect: HAProxy Stats Auth
stats auth admin:s3cret

# expect: HAProxy Insecure Password
user admin insecure-password mySecret

# === IPsec / WireGuard ===
# expect: strongSwan IPsec PSK
192.168.0.1 %any : PSK "vNkxY9LLZvwj4qCC2ogGrWDF2d21jL"

# expect: WireGuard Private Key
PrivateKey = 6AcgEPgBsH7y6IrbvQnZTGKmvIjAvqQR8nSfEyuGAWx=

# expect: WireGuard Preshared Key
PresharedKey = wPjMBdvjKF2uABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0a987=

# expect: WireGuard Public Key
PublicKey = HIgo9xNzJMWLKASShiTqIybxZ0U3wGLiUeJ1PKf8ykw=

# expect: OpenVPN Static Key
-----BEGIN OpenVPN Static key V1-----
6acdef0123456789abcdef0123456789
-----END OpenVPN Static key V1-----

# === VPN tokens ===
# expect: Tailscale Auth Key
tskey-auth-kxPLAcGenK11CNTRL-AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUv

# expect: Tailscale API Key
tskey-api-kxPLAcGenK11CNTRL-AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUv

# expect: Tailscale OAuth Client Secret
tskey-client-kxPLAcGenK11CNTRL-AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUv

# === SIEM / observability ===
# expect: Splunk HEC Token
Authorization: Splunk b5a79aad-d822-46cc-80d1-819f80d7bfb0

# expect: Sumo Logic Access ID
accessId: suEJ0L8vyc4S0h

# === OpenStack ===
# expect: OpenStack Keystone Fernet Token
gAAAAABcExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleExample

# === Cloudflare cfk / NetBox / NetBird / Defined-Net / Porkbun / CF Access (Block 3c) ===
# expect: Cloudflare API Token (cfk_)
# expect: NetBox v2 API Token
# expect: NetBird Access Token
# expect: Defined Networking API Key
# expect: Porkbun API Credential
# expect: Cloudflare Access Service Token ID
cfk_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
nbt_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA.BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB
nbp_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
dnkey-aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa-bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb
pk1_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.access
